name: Sharepoint Data Extraction
description: Retrieves files and pages from a SharePoint site, extracts their content (e.g., text from PDFs, DOCX), and outputs a DataFrame with metadata and content. Designed as the starting node in a PySpark workflow, requiring no input DataFrame.
output: A DataFrame with columns: file_name (string), file_type (string), share_point_url (string), content (string).

fields.name: sharePointConnection
fields.title: SharePoint Connection
fields.description: Connection details for the SharePoint API, including tenant_id, client_id, client_secret, and sharepoint_url (e.g., https://example.sharepoint.com/sites/SparkflowsProject).

fields.name: start_time
fields.title: Start Time
fields.description: Optional start time for filtering files/pages by lastModifiedDateTime (format: 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS' or ISO 8601, e.g., '2025-07-03 02:05:43' or '2025-07-03T02:05:43Z'). Assumes UTC if no timezone is specified.

fields.name: end_time
fields.title: End Time
fields.description: Optional end time for filtering files/pages by lastModifiedDateTime (format: 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS' or ISO 8601, e.g., '2025-07-04 23:59:59' or '2025-07-04T23:59:59Z'). Assumes UTC if no timezone is specified.
